The '''GSI-21D''' was a [[Disruptor pistol/Legends|disruptor pistol]] manufactured by [[Galactic Solutions Industries]]. It was used by [[Officer/Legends|officers]] and veterans of the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness's]] [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Army/Legends|army]] during the [[New Sith Wars]] and was illegal in most [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] because of its power. The GSI-21D was efficient at vaporizing flesh, [[Droid armor|droid plating]], and [[Armor/Legends|armor]].

==Description==
The GSI-21D was a very powerful [[Disruptor pistol/Legends|pistol]], one of the most powerful [[Disruptor/Legends|disruptors]] available during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[New Sith Wars]].<ref name="PoD" /> The weapon was described as the finest disruptor pistol manufactured by [[Galactic Solutions Industries]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan|Battle of Ruusan]].<ref name="PoD" /><ref name="CSWE" /> Each [[Power cell/Legends|power pack]] held enough energy for twelve shots before it needed to be replaced, and the maximum range of the pistol was slightly over twenty [[Meter/Legends|meters]], though the optimum range was below twenty.<ref name="PoD" />

When fired in its optimum range, the GSI-21D could easily disintegrate flesh, [[Bone/Legends|bone]], [[Droid armor|droid plating]], and [[Armor/Legends|armor]] with equal efficiency. Due to its [[Death/Legends|deadly]] abilities, it was illegal to own the weapon in most [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] controlled by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="PoD" /><ref name="CSWE" />

==History==
Sometime prior to the [[Battle of Phaseera]], Galactic Solutions Industries designed and manufactured the GSI-21D disruptor pistol. [[Officer/Legends|Officers]] and veteran [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] who proved their combat skills in the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness's]] [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Army/Legends|army]] were often assigned the pistols. [[Darth Bane/Legends|Dessel]], a [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] in the [[Gloom Walkers]] [[unit]] of the Brotherhood of Darkness, used a GSI-21D when he fought in the Battle of [[Phaseera]]. After Dessel was arrested by the Sith army for assaulting his superior officer, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Ulabore]], his GSI-21D was removed from him before he was sent to [[Prison/Legends|prison]] to await his [[Court-martial/Legends|court-martial]].<ref name="PoD" />

==Behind the scenes==
The GSI-21D was first featured in the novel ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'', written by [[Drew Karpyshyn]] and released on [[September 26]], [[2006]]. In [[December]] [[2008]], the pistol received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
